full_text:
Ma Xun (Chengheng) 馬勳 (盛衡)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Xun (馬勳), styledChengheng (盛衡), was born in Liangzhong in Baxi. Served in varying positions under Liu Bei, showed ability and was trusted. Ma Xun was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom.
